title: Oui, s'il vous plaît
excerpt: Love seeing our Yes, Please collection grace the cover of this gorgeous French magazine, Esprit Scrapbooking ! It was designed by the super talented Lilith Eeckels . Merci!
body: Love seeing our Yes, Please collection grace the cover of this gorgeous French magazine, Esprit Scrapbooking! It was designed by the super talented Lilith Eeckels. Merci!
